zh.lifeSummary: 當Osbert Mundeford IV於1381年9月25日出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍可沃爾德時，他的父親Osbert de Mundeford III36歲，母親Elizabeth27歲。他於1400年與Margaret Barrett在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1456年12月在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可霍可沃爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Osbert Mundeford IV于1381年9月25日出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可霍可沃爾德时，他的父亲Osbert de Mundeford III36岁，母亲Elizabeth27岁。他于1400年与Margaret Barrett在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1456年12月在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可霍可沃爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Mundeford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Munford
meanings: English (Norfolk): habitational name from Mundford in Norfolk, so named from the Old English personal name Munda + Old English ford ‘ford’.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mountford  .

variants.name: Mountford
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written អ៊ីវ, unexplained. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Roman number IV (meaning ‘the fourth’ of the four bearers of the name) may also be counted as a surname Iv.

nameMeanings.name: Osbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Osbert Mundeford IV was born on 25 September 1381, in Hockwold, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Osbert de Mundeford III, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 27. He married Margaret Barrett in 1400, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in December 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Hockwold, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osbert Mundeford IV est né le 25 septembre 1381, à Hockwold, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Osbert de Mundeford III, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Barrett en 1400, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en décembre 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Hockwold, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Osbert Mundeford IV am 25. September 1381 in Hockwold, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbert de Mundeford III 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 27. Er hat 1400 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Barrett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Dezember 1456 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hockwold, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Osbert Mundeford IV è nato il il 25 settembre 1381 nel Hockwold, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Osbert de Mundeford III, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Barrett nel 1400, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Hockwold, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Osbert Mundeford IVが1381年9月25日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホーックウオルドで生まれた時，父Osbert de Mundeford IIIは36歳，母Elizabethは27歳であった。1400年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでMargaret Barrettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1456年12月に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクホーックウオルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Osbert Mundeford IV(이)가 1381년 9월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호ck울드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbert de Mundeford III(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Margaret Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1456년 12월 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 호ck울드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Osbert Mundeford IV nasceu em 25 de setembro de 1381, em Hockwold, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Osbert de Mundeford III, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Barrett em 1400, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Hockwold, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Osbert Mundeford IV родился 25 сентября 1381 г. в местности хоккволд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Osbert de Mundeford III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Barrett в 1400 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер декабрь 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности хоккволд, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Osbert Mundeford IV nació el 25 de septiembre de 1381, en Hockwold, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Osbert de Mundeford III, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Barrett en 1400, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en diciembre de 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Hockwold, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
